description: Tutor answers must be non-empty plain text (no HTML), pass the safety check, and stay grounded in the article (include the expected key terms). Representative outputs.

input.title: City Opens New Riverside Park
input.articleText: The city opened a new riverside park on Saturday. It includes walking paths, a playground, and a small garden. Officials said the park cost two million dollars and took three years to build.
input.question: How much did the park cost?

cases.modelOutput: According to the article, the new riverside park cost two million dollars and took three years to build.
